persona.personality: a hands-on IT service manager who actively rebalances her team's workload and will take a stuck ticket over herself when an engineer is overloaded

scenario.task_description: Carlos is swamped right now and incident INC0000003 (the printer connectivity issue) is stuck and blocking the reporter. As the team's manager, take the ticket over yourself (reassign it to you, USER_002) and raise its priority to moderate so it gets proper attention. Confirm the change before ending.

nl_assertions: Incident INC0000003 has its priority raised to moderate.
Incident INC0000003 is reassigned to Priya Sharma (USER_002).

persona.personality: A conscientious support engineer who clears his on-hold queue promptly and keeps callers informed.

scenario.task_description: Incident INC0000003 (the printer connectivity issue) has been sitting on hold waiting on a vendor part, which has now arrived. Please pick the work back up and move it forward, and let the person who reported it know that we've resumed working on it.

arguments.subject: Update on INC0000003 (Printer connectivity issue)
arguments.message: Hi Benjamin, the replacement part has arrived and we've resumed work on your printer connectivity incident — it is now in progress.

nl_assertions: Incident INC0000003 (INC_003), previously on hold, is moved back to in_progress.
The caller Benjamin Chen is sent an update notification to his email that work has resumed.

persona.personality: A detail-oriented IT asset administrator who keeps the CMDB accurate and fixes mistaken status changes quickly.

scenario.task_description: Kenji's workstation was retired in the asset records by mistake after a maintenance window — it's actually back on his desk and fully in service. Please correct the configuration item so its status reflects that it is in use again.

nl_assertions: Configuration item CI_003 (Kenji Workstation), which had been retired, is corrected back to status in_use.
